overrides.override_summary: California Franchise Investment Law applies; all proposed agreements must be delivered with FDD; fee restrictions per Cal. Corp. Code § 31125
overrides.why_it_matters: Fee collection may be deferred until franchisee opens; additional disclosure requirements

overrides.override_summary: No waiver of claims under state franchise law; no disclaimer of reliance on franchisor statements
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee retains right to bring franchise law claims regardless of general release provisions

overrides.override_summary: Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act applies; venue and choice of law provisions subject to Illinois law
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisees may litigate in Illinois rather than being forced to Florida

overrides.override_summary: Illinois law applies to extent of Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Illinois franchise law may override Florida choice of law provisions

overrides.override_summary: Maryland law may require deferral of franchise fee collection until franchisee opens for business
overrides.why_it_matters: Reduces upfront financial burden; franchise fee escrow possible

overrides.override_summary: Cannot terminate prior to expiration except for good cause; must provide 30-day cure period
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee protected from arbitrary termination; cure right guaranteed

overrides.override_summary: Cannot refuse renewal without fairly compensating franchisee at fair market value (for terms <5 years with noncompete)
overrides.why_it_matters: Provides compensation on non-renewal; limits franchise asset loss

overrides.override_summary: Provision requiring litigation outside Michigan is void
overrides.why_it_matters: Michigan franchisee cannot be forced to litigate in Florida

overrides.override_summary: Cannot refuse transfer except for good cause
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee has greater freedom to sell business

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require waiver of rights under Michigan Franchise Investment Act; cannot restrict right to join franchisee association
overrides.why_it_matters: Preserves franchisee legal rights and association freedom

overrides.override_summary: No waiver of franchise law claims; no disclaimer of reliance; each provision effective only to extent jurisdictional requirements met
overrides.why_it_matters: Broad protection for Minnesota franchisees; franchise law is non-waivable

overrides.override_summary: No waiver of state franchise law claims including fraud in inducement; no disclaimer of reliance
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee retains all New York franchise law protections

overrides.override_summary: Venue and choice of law provisions subject to North Dakota law
overrides.why_it_matters: May litigate in North Dakota rather than Florida

overrides.override_summary: Washington Franchise Investment Protection Act (Ch. 19.100 RCW) prevails in conflicts of law
overrides.why_it_matters: Washington state law takes precedence over Florida choice of law
May litigate in Washington rather than Florida
Provides strong dealer protection including good cause termination requirements
